subjects.name: Mount Elizabeth Health Screening

typography_hierarchy.note: Hospital corporate sans with adequate H1/H2 contrast; long content blocks lack pull-quote or sectional rhythm.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Adopt a tighter editorial scale with deliberate H2 rest-points and a serif accent for trust passages.

layout_information_architecture.note: Megamenu pushes screening behind specialty links; price ranges live deep in package PDFs rather than the screening page itself.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Surface 3-package pricing shelf at top of /health-screening with one persistent enquiry CTA and FAQ.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Generic SG hospital photography and Parkway palette read as institutional rather than premium-concierge.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Commission named-consultant portraits, suite photography, and a calm signature accent colour beyond hospital blue.

content_credibility_proof.note: Hospital accreditation, named consultants, decades of brand equity — strongest trust stack in the category.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Surface specific outcome data, audited screening yield numbers and patient testimonials with consent.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile renders cleanly with reasonable Core Web Vitals; some hero imagery is heavy and CTA tap-targets are dense.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Compress hero, ship sticky helpline + booking CTA, and rework long content for thumb-readable cadence.

subjects.verdict: Category trust leader carried by hospital brand equity; digital execution lags the price tag by a generation.

subjects.name: Raffles Medical — Platinum Executive Screening

typography_hierarchy.note: Standard corporate-sans typography; price tables are clear but headings flatten across the page.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Add a display serif for 'why screening' editorial sections and tighten the price-table heading rhythm.

layout_information_architecture.note: Package pages are well structured with comparison columns and male/female pricing surfaced.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add a clear /executive landing page with persona switcher (corporate / self-pay / pre-arrangement).

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Raffles palette and medical iconography feel utilitarian rather than premium-concierge.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Develop a calmer signature palette and bespoke photography that signals concierge tier visually.

content_credibility_proof.note: 40-year SG hospital brand, corporate-account testimonials, fully published prices — strong trust artefacts.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Add audited screening-yield numbers, named-consultant biographies and clinical-evidence justification.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile usable but pages are long and dense; price tables compress awkwardly on narrow viewports.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Rework price tables for mobile (cards over columns), compress imagery, target <2.5s LCP.

subjects.verdict: Transparent pricing leader for SG hospital screening; visual and mobile execution feel a tier below the price.

subjects.name: AsiaMedic Wellness Assessment Centre

typography_hierarchy.note: Dated sans system with weak H1 sizing; long body blocks without pull-quote or rest-point.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Modernise to a confident editorial scale with deliberate H2 rests and a serif accent.

layout_information_architecture.note: Brochure-ware megamenu mixes services and locations; price-on-call gating throughout.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Restructure to imaging-led IA with a published price shelf and a single concierge CTA.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Stock medical imagery and corporate-blue palette feel interchangeable with any imaging clinic site.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Lean into 25-year radiologist heritage with archival photography, named-consultant portraits, and a signature accent.

content_credibility_proof.note: Long-standing radiologist team and 25-year imaging-only positioning give real authority.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Publish package pricing, audited screening-yield numbers and family/patient testimonials.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile renders but heavy hero, cramped tap targets and lazy-loaded images cause layout shift.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Mobile-first rebuild with <2.5s LCP, 48px tap targets and pinned booking CTA.

subjects.verdict: Closest direct competitor by category, but 2014-era brochure-ware undercuts the 25-year radiologist credibility.

subjects.name: Elite Medical Centre

typography_hierarchy.note: Modern sans with reasonable hierarchy; some sections still flatten into uniform weight.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Pair the sans with a serif accent for editorial wellness copy and lock the type scale across pages.

layout_information_architecture.note: Wellness-led IA with concierge tone; pricing is enquiry-gated which adds buyer friction.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Surface package starting prices and persona-led entry (longevity / executive / female / cardiac).

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Concierge wellness palette and lifestyle imagery position above hospital sites — closest to AEVUM tone.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Push further with bespoke named-consultant portraits and signature motion micro-language.

content_credibility_proof.note: Concierge promise is on-brand but credentials, audited outcomes and consultant bios are thin.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Add named-consultant credentials, audited outcome data and patient testimonials with consent.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile renders cleanly with reasonable polish; some heavy hero imagery and dense CTAs.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Compress hero, pin concierge CTA, target <2.5s LCP and accessibility AA pass.

subjects.verdict: Closest tonal match to a concierge-MRI brand in SG; lacks audited credibility artefacts and published pricing.

subjects.name: Iconic Medical Imaging

typography_hierarchy.note: Modern sans with confident H1; clean type rhythm across pricing pages.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Add a serif accent for trust copy and refine the editorial scale across long-form content.

layout_information_architecture.note: Strong DTC IA — price shelf, online booking, FAQ — rare in the SG imaging category.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add an explicit immediate-need vs pre-plan switcher and persona-led landings.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Clean DTC SaaS aesthetic stands out vs hospital sites but borrows from generic startup templates.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Develop a distinctly SG imaging identity — bespoke photography, iconography and motion.

content_credibility_proof.note: Transparent pricing and process; thin on accreditation, audited outcomes and consultant bios.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Publish licences, audited reviews, named-consultant page and outcome data.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Genuinely mobile-first, fast and responsive — most polished mobile experience in the SG imaging set.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Add accessibility audit beyond AA, save-and-resume booking, and offline-tolerant FAQ.

subjects.verdict: Most polished digital experience among SG imaging incumbents; brand and proof depth are the gating constraints.

subjects.name: Gleneagles Hospital Johor

typography_hierarchy.note: IHH corporate type system; consistent across the network but not specifically tuned for screening / imaging.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Build a screening sub-brand with its own editorial scale and serif accent for trust copy.

layout_information_architecture.note: Hospital-network IA pushes screening into a sub-page; pricing buried behind enquiry.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Surface a JB Cross-Border Screening landing with published prices, RTS Link directions, SG day-trip planner.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: IHH global palette is consistent but reads as 'IHH hospital' rather than 'premium concierge JB'.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Develop JB-specific brand layer — Medini photography, named-consultant portraits, concierge tone.

content_credibility_proof.note: IHH Healthcare network, Mt Elizabeth lineage, international patient services desk — strong artefacts.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Add audited screening yield, named-consultant bios, and SG cross-border patient testimonials.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile renders; hospital-network template feels desktop-first; tap targets dense.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Mobile-first rebuild with sticky concierge CTA, RTS Link directions, and Core Web Vitals tuning.

subjects.verdict: Closest geographic competitor with strong IHH credibility, but no JB cross-border concierge layer to surface it.

subjects.name: Neko Health

typography_hierarchy.note: Bespoke editorial type with confident H1 sizing and deliberate rest-points. Calm, premium, distinct.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Already the category bar — only refinement is even tighter rhythm at 4K display sizes.

layout_information_architecture.note: Single-purpose IA — one product, one price, one CTA. Best concierge funnel in the category.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add a multi-tier upsell flow as the brand scales beyond single-price simplicity.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Spa-clinical hybrid identity is unmistakable — generous whitespace, signature warm palette, hero motion.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Already the visual benchmark; only refinement is genuine cross-cultural localisation for SEA expansion.

content_credibility_proof.note: Daniel Ek halo + same-day results SLA + transparent pricing — strong artefacts.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Add audited screening yield, named-consultant credentials and clinical-evidence transparency.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Best-in-class mobile execution — motion, type and load all measured.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Marginal — add offline-tolerant booking and full WCAG AA + AAA pass for sensitive copy.

subjects.verdict: Global category benchmark for premium-concierge MRI design — the bar AEVUM is benchmarking against.

subjects.name: Prenuvo

typography_hierarchy.note: Confident DTC type with strong H1/H2 contrast; long-form science pages read well.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Tighten mid-page rhythm and pull-quote treatment for science copy.

layout_information_architecture.note: Clear DTC IA with science / locations / FAQ; published pricing on the homepage.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add a persona-led switcher (longevity / family-history / executive) and local concierge CTA per region.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Strong DTC science-meets-luxury identity with bespoke photography and motion.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Already a category benchmark; refinement is narrative depth on individual cancer-detection stories.

content_credibility_proof.note: Influencer halo, published pricing, science depth — but USPSTF-skeptical clinical evidence overhang.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Address the clinical-evidence debate head-on with audited yield data and peer-reviewed citations.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Premium mobile execution with measured motion and hero performance.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Marginal — accessibility audit beyond AA and offline-tolerant booking.

subjects.verdict: Global DTC whole-body MRI category-definer; pricing transparency and DTC funnel set the bar AEVUM matches.

subjects.name: AEVUM (self)

typography_hierarchy.note: Inter + JetBrains Mono editorial scale with deliberate H1/H2 rhythm; tag-line treatment is restrained and confident.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Lock a custom type scale across compliance / images long-form pages and refine pull-quote treatment for testimonials.

layout_information_architecture.note: Three-style-variant home + transparent four-tier RM pricing + RTS-Link cross-border narrative; lacks an explicit immediate-need entry.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add a 24h concierge entry, SG-day-trip planner, and persistent helpline + booking CTA above fold.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Premium clinical teal/amber palette with restrained gradients reads distinctly AEVUM versus hospital-blue rivals; closest tonally to Neko Health.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Commission bespoke named-consultant photography, suite photography, and a signature motion micro-language.

content_credibility_proof.note: Elitez Group operational backing, named-consultant intent, MSQH-in-pursuit — artefacts present, but audited and signed PDFs are missing.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Ship audited Q2 2026 imaging audit PDF, named-consultant credential cards, and live MSQH accreditation tracker.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile renders cleanly with consistent type and CTAs; some hero images and admin tables need tuning for 320px viewports.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Compress hero assets, pin concierge helpline, target <2.5s LCP, and full WCAG AA accessibility pass.

subjects.verdict: Brand and typography ahead of every SG/MY competitor; behind only Neko and Prenuvo on bespoke artefacts and audited credibility.

synthesis.aevum_position: Tied at 7.8 — clearly ahead of every SG hospital and standalone imaging player; behind only the global DTC benchmarks Neko (9.2) and Prenuvo (8.2). The gap is bespoke artefacts and audited credibility, not aesthetic.
easy_wins_for_aevum: Surface the cross-border SG↔JB pricing arbitrage — Mt Elizabeth S$12,388 vs AEVUM Comprehensive S$2,636 — above the fold on the home page.
Ship a downloadable Q2 2026 audited Imaging Standards PDF with MSQH-in-pursuit progress, named-consultant CVs and FSC-class concierge SLA commitments.
Add an SG-day-trip concierge landing page with RTS Link directions, single-screen intake form and S$5–7 fare benchmark.
ten_x_aspirations: Live MSQH accreditation tracker widget pulling from a public ledger, updated as each audit milestone clears.
Public clinical-evidence ledger linking each tier (Core / Comprehensive / Legacy) to peer-reviewed citations and audited yield numbers.
SG GP / specialist follow-up partnership flow with verified referrals, status tracking and same-week consult scheduling.
